fonts.import_instructions: Import both from Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');

rules.H1: font-poppins text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900 leading-[1.1]
rules.H2: font-poppins text-3xl md:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900
rules.overlines: font-inter text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-green-600

visual_enhancers.cards: bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-slate-100 p-8 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1
visual_enhancers.buttons: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-poppins font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg inline-flex items-center justify-center

layouts.spacing: Use p-8, p-12, p-24 for section paddings. Generous breathing room.
layouts.about_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Intro spans 12 or 5, cards span 7 in a sub-grid.

rules: Staggered fade-up entrances for cards using framer-motion.
Parallax effect on hero background image.
Hover scale on gallery images (hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500).
CountUp animation for Impact statistics when in view.

components_instructions.header: Sticky top-0 z-50 with crystal glassmorphism. Navigation links MUST be visible on desktop. Include CTA 'Donate Now' button.
components_instructions.hero: Full width image background, heavy gradient overlay on left for text readability. H1, Subheading, and two buttons ('Become a Volunteer', 'Donate Now').
components_instructions.about: Bento grid approach. 4 feature cards (Education, Healthcare, Women Empowerment, Environment) using lucide-react icons.
components_instructions.impact_stats: Use react-countup inside a framer-motion in-view trigger. Large typography for numbers, green-600 color for emphasis.
components_instructions.volunteer_form: Modern input fields with generous padding. 2-column layout on desktop.
components_instructions.donate_section: Selectable cards for ₹500, ₹1000, ₹2500, Custom. Use lucide-react QrCode icon for the QR placeholder. 'Donate Securely' prominent button.
components_instructions.testimonials: Grid of 4 clean cards. Include avatar image, rating stars (lucide-react Star), and quote.
components_instructions.footer: Dark background (bg-slate-900 text-slate-300). 4-column layout with quick links, contact, newsletter.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
DO NOT use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry and bento grids.
Ensure contrast rules are met. Do not use fully transparent navbars. Use glassmorphism.
Add transition effects to interactive elements (e.g. hover states), but exclude 'all' to prevent breaking transforms.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on ALL interactive and key informational elements.
Use generous padding (p-8, p-12, p-16) to create a premium feel.
DO NOT output placeholder image URLs. Only use the provided URLs.
Use React (+ Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion). Remember it is a .js environment, so do not output TypeScript (.tsx). Use prop-types or standard js.
